one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Nation business entities (Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership) - significantly higher than prior year and represents large non-operational income
economic_notes: Band has 33.33% ownership in Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership, Tahltan Nation Development Corporation, and Tahltan Legacy Corporation. Band has 100% ownership in Tahltan Band Development Corporation. TNDLP had total assets of $105,854,003 and net income of $4,521,283 as at December 31, 2023.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations assessment not completed so financial impact unknown; (2) Audited financial information not available for Tahltan Band Development Corporation (100% owned) and Tahltan Nation Development Corp/Legacy Corp (33.33% owned) for year ended March 31, 2024 - adjustments to investments and earnings may be required. Consolidated subsidiaries include CMHC Social Housing Program, Stikine Housing Authority Society, and Tahltan Health and Social Services Society. GBEs accounted for by modified equity include Tahltan Band Development Corporation (100%), Tahltan Legacy Corporation (33.33%), Tahltan Nation Development Corporation (33.33%), and Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership (33.33%). TNDLP financial info is as at December 31, 2023 (different year-end). Prior year audited by different firm with qualified opinion dated December 14, 2023. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + BC + CMHC + BC Gaming + ABMA + FNESC + NRT.
